request.messages: [redacted: candidate evidence omitted from raw judge artifact]

message.reasoning_content:
We are asked to validate extracted ASHRAE Guideline 36 items in one batch. We need to output strictly JSON with one verdict per candidate_id. We need to accept an item only if it is useful, grounded ASHRAE Guideline 36 operational knowledge. Reject items that are legal/front matter, TOC text, generic definitions without operational use, duplicated/noisy extraction, or summaries not supported by evidence.

Allowed category_if_not values: null, front_matter, toc, generic_definition, unsupported, duplicate, other.

We'll evaluate each candidate based on its summary and evidence. The evidence should support the summary and be operational knowledge. If it's clearly operational sequence or fault diagnostic rule, and the summary is accurate and grounded, we accept.

Let's examine each:

cand_4e66df28d2857694: Title "Supply Fan Run Condition", section 5.18.4.1, summary: "The supply fan shall run whenever the unit is in any mode other than Unoccupied Mode." Evidence quote matches. This is operational, grounded. Accept.

cand_9c95b80074aad9ae: "Fan Speed Ramp Limitation", summary: "Provide a ramp function to prevent changes in fan speed of more than 10% per minute." Evidence matches. Operational, accept.

cand_ac114bf5447d4a01: "Medium Fan Speed Reset Based on OAT", summary: "Medium fan speed MedSpeed is reset linearly based on outdoor air temperature from MinSpeed when OAT ≥ Endpoint #1 to MaxCoolSpeed when OAT ≤ Endpoint #2." Evidence quote: "Medium fan speed MedSpeed shall be reset linearly based on outdoor air temperature from MinSpeed when outdoor air temperature is greater or equal to Endpoint #1 to MaxCoolSpeed when outdoor air temperature is less than or equal to Endpoint #2." Summary matches, operational, accept.

cand_9837e3d1a16450e4: "Supply Air Temperature Deadband Setpoint", summary: "The Deadband values of SATsp and SATsp-C shall be the average of the zone heating setpoint and the zone cooling setpoint but shall be no lower than 21°C (70°F) and no higher than 24°C (75°F)." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_5b34b1ad96209cde: "Fan Speed and SAT Setpoint Control Map", summary: "When supply fan is proven ON, fan speed and SAT setpoints are controlled as per Figures 5.18.4.5-1 through 5.18.4.5-3, with separate gains for each section of the control map." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_198c207c37cf2df7: "Fan Speed Reset in Heating and Cooling", summary: "Fan speed is reset based on heating or cooling loop signal: from MaxHeatSpeed to MinSpeed for 100% to 50% heating, MinSpeed for 50% to 0% heating and deadband, MinSpeed for 0% to 25% cooling, reset from MinSpeed to MedSpeed for 25% to 50% cooling, MedSpeed for 50% to 75% cooling, and reset from MedSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed for 75% to 100% cooling." Evidence quote matches list a-g. Accept.

cand_bdcf0b90b0a66677: "SAT Control Loop Enable for SATsp", summary: "The control loop for SATsp is enabled when the supply air fan is proven ON and disabled and set to neutral otherwise." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_7590fff5dd1acf0d: "SAT Control Loop Mapping for Heating and Economizer", summary: "Supply air temperature shall be controlled to SATsp by a control loop whose output is mapped to sequence the heating coil and economizer dampers as shown in Figure 5.18.5.2." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_bc7f3b67238aa0bd: "SATsp-C Control Loop Enable", summary: "The control loop for SATsp-C is enabled when the supply fan is proven ON and the Zone State is cooling and disabled and set to neutral otherwise." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_40d5f016c3ba2c5f: "SATsp-C Control Loop Action", summary: "When enabled, supply air temperature shall be controlled to SATsp-C by modulating the cooling coil." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_881555a59c71b92c: "Minimum OA Control Loop with Flow Station", summary: "Minimum outdoor air control loop is enabled when supply fan is proven on and in Occupied Mode and disabled and output set to zero otherwise." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_b510ec8ca1ccbf4a: "Minimum OA Flow Control with Flow Station", summary: "The minimum outdoor airflow rate shall be maintained at MinOAsp by a reverse-acting control loop whose output is mapped to MinOA-P." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_92fade63acd31157: "Economizer Lockout Disable", summary: "The normal sequencing of the economizer dampers shall be disabled in accordance with Section 5.1.17." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_fa6809905519c6d3: "Economizer Reenable Delay", summary: "Once the economizer is disabled, it shall not be reenabled within 10 minutes and vice versa." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_4f8ce98a1f5a0b1b: "MaxOA-P Setpoint Based on Economizer State", summary: "When economizer is enabled, MaxOA-P = 100%. When economizer is disabled, set MaxOA-P equal to MinOA-P." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_26daaaeb93b0b3ae: "Relief Damper Enable for Direct Building Pressure Control", summary: "Relief dampers shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON, and disabled otherwise." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_b764773be33403fa: "Relief Damper Modulation for Direct Building Pressure Control", summary: "When enabled, use a P-only control loop to modulate relief dampers to maintain 12 Pa (0.05 in. of water) building static pressure." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_c01cfb5d65360d60: "Relief Damper Enable for Passive Building Pressure Control", summary: "Relief dampers shall be enabled when the associated supply fan is proven ON and any outdoor air damper is open, and disabled and closed otherwise." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_e63e4ef5399e42ac: "Relief Damper Position Reset for Passive Control", summary: "Relief-damper position shall be reset linearly from MinRelief to MaxRelief as MinOAsp is reset from MinOA to DesOA." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_57722e65de0e56ec: "Return Fan Speed Tracking Differential", summary: "Return-fan speed shall be controlled to maintain return fan speed equal to supply fan speed less differential S-R-SPD-DIFF*." Evidence quote given is only "5.18.10.1.  Return -Fan Control  – Speed Tracking" but the summary seems to match the title. However, evidence quote is incomplete; it only gives the section heading, not the actual requirement statement. The summary says "Return-fan speed shall be controlled to maintain return fan speed equal to supply fan speed less differential S-R-SPD-DIFF*." But the evidence quote is just the section title, not supporting the full summary. Might be unsupported. Let's check: The evidence_quote provided is: "5.18.10.1.  Return -Fan Control  – Speed Tracking" which is just a heading, not the actual text that would support the summary. So this is a summary not supported by the evidence quote given. We should reject as unsupported.

cand_e8c3a9711e773453: "Active Differential Airflow Setpoint Calculation", summary: "The active differential airflow setpoint S-R-SPD-DIFF* shall be S-R-SPD-DIFF adjusted by MinOAsp relative to DesOA: S-R-SPD-DIFF* = S-R-SPD-DIFF * (MinOAsp / DesOA)." Evidence quote is again only the same heading "5.18.10.1.  Return -Fan Control  – Speed Tracking". Not supporting the formula. Unsupported.

cand_cfc57c4b3b1376a7: "Freeze Protection Stage 1", summary matches evidence quote. Accept.

cand_bc11b4fd27009ca1: "Freeze Protection Stage 2", summary begins "If SAT drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both economizer and minimum OA dampers for 1 hour and set a Level 3 alarm. After 1 hour, resume minimum OA ventilation and enter Stage 1." Evidence quote provided: "5.18.11.2.  If the supply air temperature drops below 3°C (38°F) for 5 minutes, fully close both the economi zer" It is truncated and only partially shows the condition. The summary goes beyond the evidence quote (the evidence doesn't mention closing minimum OA damper, 1 hour, alarm, resume). So it's unsupported. However, maybe the full text from the page does say that, but the evidence quote provided is incomplete. Our task is to validate based on the given evidence quote. Since the evidence quote is insufficient, we should reject as unsupported. Note: source_pages are given but we can't access them. We rely on the evidence_quote. So cand_bc11b4fd27009ca1 is unsupported.

cand_4b9abf49894a7fad: "Freeze Protection Stage 3", summary: "Upon signal from freeze-stat or if SAT drops below 3°C for 15 minutes or below 1°C for 5 minutes, shut down supply and return/relief fans, close OA damper, set cooling coil valve to 100%, energize CHW pump system, send heating plant requests, modulate heating coil to maintain SAT or MAT at 27°C (80°F), and set Level 2 alarm. Shutdown remains until reset by software switch." Evidence quote: "5.18.11.3.  Upon signal from the freeze -stat (if installed), or if supply air temperature dro ps below 3°C (38°F)" Again truncated, insufficient to support the full summary. Reject as unsupported.

cand_f0e059d0d59a40d0: "Maintenance Interval Alarm", summary: "Maintenance interval alarm when fan has operated for more than 1500 hours: Level 4. Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_216ae9a3b38e02da: "Fan Status Mismatch Alarm", summary matches evidence. Accept.

cand_6df9f9cc0a60d5db: "Filter Pressure Drop Alarm", summary: "Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed: Level 4. Alarm limit varies with fan speed as DPx = DP100 * (x)^1.4." Evidence quote provided: "5.18.12.3.  Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan" Truncated, does not include the full details about Level 4, fan speed condition, formula. So unsupported. Reject.

cand_f7b4a12dfdc187be: "AFDD Operating State Definition", summary: "The OS of each AHU shall be defined by the commanded positions of heating coil valve, cooling coil valve, and economizer damper per Table 5.18.13.2." Evidence matches: "The OS of each AHU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating-coil control valve, cooling-coil control valve, and economizer damper in accordance with Table 5.18.13.2 and Figure 5.18.13.2." Accept.

cand_a8dc6b862ed5ede7: "AFDD Fault Condition FC#2", summary provides equation and description. Evidence quote gives full equation and description. Accept.

cand_2cf998652ff1385d: "AFDD Fault Condition FC#3", summary provides equation and description. Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_8948424d55c93d9b: "AFDD Fault Condition FC#7", summary provides equation and description. Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_0d8466f2a6687541: "AFDD Fault Condition FC#10", summary provides equation and description. Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_c13590105da95dad: "AFDD Fault Condition FC#13", summary provides equation and description. Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_89d36c88a6fc1b36: "AFDD Evaluation Suspension Conditions", summary: "Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended when AHU is not operating and for a period of ModeDelay minutes following a change in mode of any Zone Group served by the AHU." Evidence matches, accept.

cand_8a058c38edb650e5: "AFDD Alarm Delay and Reporting", summary: "A fault condition that evaluates as TRUE must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is reported to the operator." Evidence matches. Accept.

cand_b1f2e8f09df7d9e3: "AFDD Test Mode", summary matches evidence. Accept.

cand_c303ea7b97cecbf4: "AFDD Alarm Level and Content", summary matches evidence. Accept.

Now we need to output verdicts as JSON. For rejected ones, we provide is_valid_guideline36_knowledge false and a reason and category_if_not. For accept, is_valid true, reason maybe "Operational knowledge from Guideline 36", category_if_not null.

Let's list all candidate IDs in order with decision.

cand_4e66df28d2857694: true
cand_9c95b80074aad9ae: true

cand_9837e3d1a16450e4: true

cand_57722e65de0e56ec: reject, unsupported, evidence quote only section heading, not operational statement

cand_cfc57c4b3b1376a7: true
cand_bc11b4fd27009ca1: reject, unsupported, evidence quote truncated, insufficient to support summary
cand_4b9abf49894a7fad: reject, unsupported, evidence quote truncated
cand_f0e059d0d59a40d0: true

Now produce JSON. We'll give a short reason for each. For rejects, we'll say "unsupported" and category_if_not "unsupported". For accepts, reason "Operational knowledge" or something concise.

Final JSON output.
